text:
Egypersia (エジプーシャ, Ejipūsha) is a country on an unknown continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Overview

One of the items necessary for becoming a Nostrade bodyguard was from a tomb in this country. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

In order to become a Nostrade bodyguard, Basho retrieves a Mummified Right Arm from an Egypersian Tomb and delivers it to Dalzollene. 

Trivia

Egypersia is most likely a portmanteau of Egypt ( エジプ ト, Ejipu to) and Persia (ペル シャ , Per usha ), and also a reference to these places.
In the 1999 anime adaptation (subtitled version), its name is transliterated as "Egypsha".

Translations around the World
